# WPILib 2026 development instructions

- **Project:** FRC (FIRST Robotics Competition) 2026 season, Java, command-based.
- **Libraries:** WPILib 2026, PathPlanner, AdvantageKit, REVLib, maple-sim (simulation).
- Use WPILib and PathPlanner 2026 APIs; avoid deprecated or reflection-based code.
- Prefer constants in `frc.robot.constants`; keep simulator logic in `frc.robot.simulation`.
